postconditions: result == (previous_head < u64::MAX && committed_head == previous_head + 1 && (block_gas_limit == 0 || block_gas_used <= block_gas_limit) && included_count != 0 && included_count == staged_count && safe_included_count == included_count)
acceptance_criteria: A committed block is safe only when a nonterminal head advances by exactly one, block gas stays within limit unless the limit is disabled, and the included/staged/safe counts exactly match and are nonempty.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core && cargo test -p ic-evm-core produce_block_selects_top_k_by_fee_then_submission_order
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core unit suite plus evm-core block production adapter test
